name: Double Brownies
recipeIngredient: Butter or margarine, 1/2 cup (for butterscotch layer)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the chocolate layer: Beat eggs until foamy. Add sugar, flour, chopped walnuts, and salt. Melt cocoa and butter together in a saucepan. Add to egg mixture and blend well. Spread in a greased 9 x 13 pan.
2. Set aside.
3. For the butterscotch layer: Cream butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs and vanilla. Beat until well mixed. Gradually add flour, salt, and chopped walnuts. Spoon over chocolate layer in small blobs and spread as best you can.
4. Bake at 350°F (or 180°C) for 30 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the pan.
Note: My family doesn't like walnuts, so I usually omit them. If desired, try baking just the butterscotch part in a greased 9 x 9 or 8 x 8 pan.
